name: 检查状态更新
sqlTemplate:
-- 查询已删除的数据（从日志表）
SELECT 
    'DELETED' AS data_status,
    l.strExamineID,
    l.strExamineNo,
    l.strExamineStatus,
    l.strOrderID,
    l.strExamPatientID,
    l.strExamPatientName,
    l.strExamSex,
    l.datExamBirth,
    l.strExamPatIDCard,
    l.strExamPhone,
    l.strExamTypeName,
    l.strBodyName,
    l.strExamineDepartment,
    l.strEquipmentName,
    l.strApplyTime,
    l.strExamineTime,
    l.strRegisterTime,
    l.strApplyDoctor,
    l.strApplyDepartment,
    l.strRegDoctor,
    l.strExamDoctor,
    l.strExamTechnician,
    l.txtExamClinicDiagnose,
    l.decExamineCost,
    l.decExamMedCost,
    l.intImageNum,
    l.intPACSImageNum,
    l.strIfCharged,
    l.strIfConfirmFee,
    l.strImageQC,
    l.decImageQCScore,
    l.strReportQC,
    l.decReportQCScore,
    l.dtmUpdate,
    l.dtmNew,
    l.strApplyDoctorNo,
    l.strApplyDepartmentNo,
    l.strPatientName,
    l.strSex,
    l.datBirth,
    l.strPatIDCard,
    l.strPhone
FROM T_LogDeleteExam l
WHERE l.strExamineID = ${strEventReferenceId}

UNION ALL

-- 查询未删除的数据（从原表联查）
SELECT 
    'ACTIVE' AS data_status,
    e.strExamineID,
    e.strExamineNo,
    e.strExamineStatus,
    e.strOrderID,
    p.strPatientID AS strExamPatientID,
    p.strPatientName AS strExamPatientName,
    p.strSex AS strExamSex,
    p.datBirth AS datExamBirth,
    p.strPatIDCard AS strExamPatIDCard,
    p.strPhone AS strExamPhone,
    e.strExamTypeName,
    e.strBodyName,
    e.strExamineDepartment,
    e.strEquipmentName,
    e.strApplyTime,
    e.strExamineTime,
    e.strRegisterTime,
    r.strApplyDoctor,
    r.strApplyDepartment,
    e.strRegDoctor,
    e.strExamDoctor,
    e.strExamTechnician,
    r.txtClinicDiagnose AS txtExamClinicDiagnose,
    e.decExamineCost,
    e.decExamMedCost,
    e.intImageNum,
    e.intPACSImageNum,
    e.strIfCharged,
    e.strIfConfirmFee,
    e.strImageQC,
    e.decImageQCScore,
    e.strReportQC,
    e.decReportQCScore,
    e.dtmUpdate,
    e.dtmNew,
    r.strApplyDoctorNo,
    r.strApplyDepartmentNo,
    p.strPatientName,
    p.strSex,
    p.datBirth,
    p.strPatIDCard,
    p.strPhone
FROM tblExamine e
LEFT JOIN tblOrder r ON e.strOrderId = r.strOrderId
LEFT JOIN tblPatient p ON r.strPatientID = p.strPatientID
WHERE e.strExamineID = ${strEventReferenceId}
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM T_LogDeleteExam l 
        WHERE l.strExamineID = e.strExamineID
    );

name: 报告发布
sqlTemplate:
SELECT *
FROM tblExamine e
LEFT JOIN tblOrder r ON e.strOrderId = r.strOrderId
LEFT JOIN tblPatient p ON r.strPatientID = p.strPatientID
left join tblReport t on  t.strExamineID = e.strExamineID
where strExamineID = ${strEventReferenceId}

name: 未取消登记通用
sqlTemplate:
SELECT *
FROM tblExamine e
LEFT JOIN tblOrder r ON e.strOrderId = r.strOrderId
LEFT JOIN tblPatient p ON r.strPatientID = p.strPatientID
where strExamineID = ${strEventReferenceId}
